description_long: This hotel is a mid-rise, modern structure with a geometric facade featuring alternating beige and white panels. The building has a prominent blue and brown entrance area, with a flat roof and several balconies on the side, each with blue-tinted glass railings. The front of the hotel includes a large, covered entrance canopy and signage above the main entry. The windows are arranged in a regular grid, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms. The ground level includes a commercial or lobby area with large glass windows and a distinct blue overhang. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on straight lines and functional aesthetics.
description: A modern, mid-rise hotel with a geometric beige and white facade, blue-tinted glass balconies, and a prominent blue entrance canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a blue canopy, signage, and a patterned facade of beige and white panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white wall and the brown roofline, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly blank wall with a few windows and a large, flat surface.
description_view_3: Back/side view showing multiple balconies with blue glass railings and the main entrance area extending outward.
attribute_hotel_signage: Signage with the word 'HARPER' is visible on the roof above the main entrance.
attribute_entrance_canopy: Rectangular canopy with blue and brown elements above the main entrance.
